Class TestUtils

java.lang.Object
tests.TestUtils
public class TestUtils extends Object
Helper assertions and movement setup utilities for Sokoban tests.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    assertBoardState(EasySokoban sokoban, int boxesInTarget)
    Asserts that current board counters and composition match expectations.
    static void
    assertJustCreatedBoardState(EasySokoban sokoban, int width, int height, int boxesInTarget)
    Asserts the full state right after creating a board.
    static void
    assertPlayerInPosition(EasySokoban sokoban, int row, int column)
    Asserts player position coordinates.
    static void
    assertTypeInPosition(EasySokoban sokoban, int row, int column, int type)
    Asserts cell type at a specific board position.
    static int[][]
    getTestBoard()
    Returns the static board used by tests.
    static EasySokoban
    getTestSokoban()
    Creates a Sokoban instance from the shared test board.
    static void
    shouldMoveBox(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction, Map<String,Integer> expectedTypes)
    Verifies that a box push updates board and counters as expected.
    static void
    shouldMoveToAnEmptyCell(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction)
    Verifies that the player successfully moves into an adjacent empty cell.
    static void
    shouldThrowAttemptingToMoveToANonEmptyCell(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction, int cellType)
    Verifies that attempting to move into a non-empty target cell throws an exception.
    static void
    shouldThrowWhenMovesAndThereAreSeveralObjectsNotLettingItMove(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction)
    Verifies that moving into a chain of blocked objects throws an impossible-move exception.

  • Constructor Details

    • TestUtils

      public TestUtils()

  • Method Details

    • assertJustCreatedBoardState

      public static void assertJustCreatedBoardState(EasySokoban sokoban, int width, int height, int boxesInTarget)
      Asserts the full state right after creating a board.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      width - expected board width.
      height - expected board height.
      boxesInTarget - expected number of fixed boxes.

    • assertBoardState

      public static void assertBoardState(EasySokoban sokoban, int boxesInTarget)
      Asserts that current board counters and composition match expectations.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      boxesInTarget - expected number of fixed boxes.

    • assertPlayerInPosition

      public static void assertPlayerInPosition(EasySokoban sokoban, int row, int column)
      Asserts player position coordinates.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      row - expected row.
      column - expected column.

    • assertTypeInPosition

      public static void assertTypeInPosition(EasySokoban sokoban, int row, int column, int type)
      Asserts cell type at a specific board position.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      row - board row.
      column - board column.
      type - expected cell type.

    • shouldThrowWhenMovesAndThereAreSeveralObjectsNotLettingItMove

      public static void shouldThrowWhenMovesAndThereAreSeveralObjectsNotLettingItMove(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction)
      Verifies that moving into a chain of blocked objects throws an impossible-move exception.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      playerRow - expected player row before and after failed move.
      playerColumn - expected player column before and after failed move.
      direction - attempted direction.

    • shouldThrowAttemptingToMoveToANonEmptyCell

      public static void shouldThrowAttemptingToMoveToANonEmptyCell(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction, int cellType)
      Verifies that attempting to move into a non-empty target cell throws an exception.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      playerRow - expected player row before and after failed move.
      playerColumn - expected player column before and after failed move.
      direction - attempted direction.
      cellType - blocking cell type expected in front of the player.

    • shouldMoveToAnEmptyCell

      public static void shouldMoveToAnEmptyCell(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction)
      Verifies that the player successfully moves into an adjacent empty cell.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      playerRow - initial player row.
      playerColumn - initial player column.
      direction - movement direction.

    • shouldMoveBox

      public static void shouldMoveBox(EasySokoban sokoban, int playerRow, int playerColumn, char direction, Map<String,Integer> expectedTypes)
      Verifies that a box push updates board and counters as expected.
      Parameters:
      sokoban - game under test.
      playerRow - initial player row.
      playerColumn - initial player column.
      direction - movement direction.
      expectedTypes - map with keys old and new for destination cell state.

    • getTestBoard

      public static int[][] getTestBoard()
      Returns the static board used by tests.
      Returns:
      test board matrix.

    • getTestSokoban

      public static EasySokoban getTestSokoban() throws SokobanException
      Creates a Sokoban instance from the shared test board.
      Returns:
      test Sokoban instance.
      Throws:
      SokobanException - when board validation fails.
